x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CIs not updated in 90+ days are likely to have outdated attributes. Now Assist uses sys_updated_on as a freshness signal -- highly stale CIs are deprioritized but still introduce noise into impact analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Expand and schedule discovery runs to cover all infrastructure segments more frequently. Configure daily or weekly discovery for critical infrastructure via discovery_schedule_list.do. Target: ≤20% of CIs stale at 90 days.
